title: Niterói, RJ — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Niterói, RJ: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Niterói is a city in RJ with a population of 515,317. Across Guanabara Bay from Rio, known for its high quality of life, the Niemeyer-designed MAC museum, and stunning coastal views.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
